prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021年第19→2022年第18→2023年第16→2024年第14→2025年第13→2026年第14 ，稳居全国顶尖理工类高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风等3起负面事件，但学校舆情应对较为迅速；抖音热度排名第47（较热），短视频平台 关注度较高，反映报考热度不减；第五轮学科评估A-及以上12个：信息与通信工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A、材料科学与工程A 、光学工程A、管理科学与工程A等，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与北理工优势学科方向一致；本 省2026年考生总数约535000人，较2025年增长约15.5%，竞争显著加剧；北京理工大学位于北京，在四川省招生占比约2%- 4%（2022-2025年），非本省高校，地域偏好对四川考生影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年物理类计划小幅缩招、本省考生总数大幅增加以及学校 层次持续提升等因素，竞争进一步加剧；但声誉偏负面带来轻微抑制。，结合考生规模扩大效应略作前移修正；预测最低位次约1113名，区间986– 1240名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 2551 → 2235 → 2046 → 1162. Over the past four years, the ranking has continuously moved forward (decreasing numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1389 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1162, indicating a sustained increase in application popularity. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 108 in 2022, 110 in 2023, 106 in 2024, and 54 in 2025 (due to adjustments in the new college entrance examination subject classification). The 2026 physics category plan is 51, a reduction of about 5.6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been rising: 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, firmly among the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving 3 negative incidents related to teacher ethics and conduct, but the university responded relatively quickly to public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), indicating high attention on short video platforms and reflecting sustained application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 12 disciplines were rated A- or above: Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, consistent with BIT's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, and its enrollment proportion in Sichuan Province is about 2%-4% (2022-2025). It is not a provincial university, so regional preference has a neutral impact on Sichuan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 physics category enrollment plan, the significant increase in the number of provincial examinees, and the continuous improvement in the university's level, competition is further intensified. However, the slightly negative reputation brings a mild suppression. Combined with the effect of the expanded examinee scale, a slight forward correction is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1113, with a range of 986–1240.
